title: How to Choose Between a Web Designer and App Designer
excerpt: Web designers and app designers may seem interchangeable, but they work with different platforms, principles, and constraints. This post helps you understand the distinction and make the right hiring decision for your specific project.
content:
You've decided you need professional design help — but you're not sure whether to look for a web designer or an app designer. Are they the same thing? Can one do both? And does it really matter?

It matters more than you might think. Let's break it down.

Web Designers: What They Specialize In

Web designers focus on creating experiences for the browser. They design sites that:

  • Work across multiple screen sizes (responsive design)
  • Load quickly and rank well in search engines
  • Guide users toward specific goals (calls to action, sign-ups, purchases)
  • Feel aligned with a brand's identity
Web designers understand browser behavior, CSS limitations, and how people navigate websites from desktops, tablets, and phones.

App Designers: What They Specialize In

App designers — particularly mobile app designers — focus on experiences built for iOS and Android devices. They understand:

  • Touch-based interaction patterns (tap, swipe, pinch)
  • Platform-specific design guidelines (Apple's Human Interface Guidelines, Google's Material Design)
  • Smaller screens and how to use them effectively
  • Native app behavior vs. web behavior
They design for thumbs, not mice — a critical distinction.

Where They Overlap

Many designers work across both disciplines, especially those who design web apps and Progressive Web Apps (PWAs). If your project lives in a gray zone — like a SaaS dashboard that needs to work on both desktop browsers and mobile devices — you may want a designer experienced in both.

How to Decide

Ask yourself:

1. What platform is this for? Native mobile app → App Designer. Website → Web Designer.
2. What are the primary interactions? Touch and gesture → App Designer. Mouse and scroll → Web Designer.
3. What are the platform expectations? App store listing → App Designer. Google search visibility → Web Designer.

One Team for Both

At Bluewaves Technology, we design and develop both websites and apps. Our team has deep expertise in both disciplines, so whether you need a powerful business website, a sleek mobile app, or both working in harmony — we've got you covered.
